use_codes.desc: TESTOSTERONE REPLACEMENT THERAPY IN ADULT MALES FOR CONDITIONS ASSOCIATED WITH A DEFICIENCY OR ABSENCE OF ENDOGENOUS TESTOSTERONE; PRIMARY HYPOGONADISM (CONGENITAL OR ACQUIRED); HYPOGONADOTROPIC HYPOGONADISM (CONGENITAL OR ACQUIRED).
METHODS OF ADMINISTERING TESTOSTERONE UNDECANOATE FOR RESTORING TESTOSTERONE CONCENTRATION IN A HYPOGONADAL MALE SUBJECT
METHODS OF CONTINUING OR DISCONTINUING A DOSAGE REGIMEN OF A TESTOSTERONE UNDECANOATE PHARMACEUTICAL COMPOSITION TO A HYPOGONADAL MALE SUBJECT
